description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in autonomous mode, was stopped for a red traffic light on northbound Bryant Street at the 
intersection with 16th Street in San Francisco. A passenger car (Vehicle 2) was also stopped for the same traffic light directly behind the 
Zoox vehicle. After a few seconds, the passenger car started to inch forward and rear-ended the stopped Zoox vehicle, and the Zoox vehicle 
operator then disengaged from autonomy. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the rear bumper. There were no reported injuries at 
that time and the police were not called. The Zoox vehicle camera footage shows that the passenger car driver was not looking ahead at the 
roadway before or at the time of contact. Zoox is submitting this updated report to include new information on notice of an unspecified 
injury allegation received on February 4, 2025, from the Zoox vehicle operator.
Print
Clear Form
